instruction:
In order to assess the opinion of students at the Ohio State University on campus safety, a reporter for the student newspaper interviews 15 students he meets walking on the campus late at night who are willing to give their opinion.
(a) The sample obtained is [ANS] A. a probability sample of students with night classes.  B. a stratified random sample of students feeling safe.  C. a simple random sample of students feeling safe.  D. probably biased.
(b) The method of sampling used is [ANS] A. simple random sampling.  B. a census.  C. the Gallup Poll.  D. voluntary response.
(c) The sample is [ANS] A. the 15 students interviewed.  B. all those students walking on campus late at night.  C. all students at universities with safety issues.  D. all students approached by the reporter.
